_description: Adversarial fixture for Q3.6-3 (auto-close <think> before <tool_call>). Assistant content has TWO tool calls: a completed one early in the turn, then an unclosed `<think>` block followed by a SECOND `<tool_call>`. The auto-close logic must inject `</think>` before the SECOND tool call (the one wrapped by the unclosed think), not the FIRST. Codex adversarial review (2026-05-06) caught that the original Q3.6-3 used `content.find('<tool_call>')` which returns the FIRST tool_call regardless of position relative to last_think, leaving the second tool call still inside the unclosed think.
_bug: Codex adversarial review finding (2026-05-06): Q3.6-3 auto-close picks first tool_call, not the one after the unclosed think.

messages.content: Get weather for SF and NYC
